# pai sessions

> Alias for `pai` — show the unified deduped listing.

## Synopsis

```
pai sessions [options]
```

## Options

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--all` | Show all entries including cold / zero-session / archived projects |  |
| `-n, --n <count>` | Max candidates for history search | `20` |
